title: Luminex-Based Multiplex Cytokine Analysis
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"26pbn","text":"Multiplexed kit \"Mouse High Sensitivity T Cell Magnetic Bead Panel\" allows a Simultaneous analyze low levels of cytokine and chemokine biomarker with the High Sensitivity Bead-Based Multiplex Assays using the Luminex technology, in mouse serum, plasma and cell culture samples.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
materials_text: {"blocks":[{"key":"663os","text":"Materials","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":9}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"490h5","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"aj9rm","text":"Mouse High Sensitivity T Cell Magnetic Bead Panel\" (MHSTCMAG-70K, MILLIPLEX, EMD Millipore Corp., Billerica, MA, USA)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"e58hf","text":"FLEXMAP 3D® instrument (Luminex Corp., Austin, TX, USA)","type":"unordered-list-item","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Measure Cytokines from murine plasma samples, including IFN-γ, IL-1β, IL-2, IL-4, IL-6, IL-10, IL-17A, and TNF-α simultaneously using the multiplexed kit "Mouse High Sensitivity T Cell Magnetic Bead Panel" (MHSTCMAG-70K, MILLIPLEX, EMD Millipore Corp., Billerica, MA, USA).
Perform the assay according to the manufacturer's instructions with an Overnight incubation step (17 hours) at 4 °C .
Analyze samples as single values and use two controls with corresponding acceptance ranges, provided with the kit, for quality control purposes.
Perform the readout on a FLEXMAP 3D® instrument (Luminex Corp., Austin, TX, USA).
Use the Bio-Plex Manager TM software (version 6.2) (Bio-Rad, Hercules, CA, USA) for back-calculation of unknown cytokine concentrations.
Acquire data using Luminex xPONENT® software (version 4.3) and determine mean fluorescence intensity (MFI).
creator: carmela giachino
